section.title: Introduction
section.para: The package opennlp.tools.pii finds personally identifiable mentions as exact spans over the original text. A PiiAnnotator writes the opennlp:pii layer from a PiiExtractor; the built-in CursorPiiExtractor recognizes email addresses, phone numbers, and payment card numbers, each with a type constant and a normalized form.

section.title: Annotating and masking
